target.label: MieNDI TOP page
target.pageScope: TOP first-screen plus first proof band

objective: Generate and route a better TOP-page design image without requiring the user to inspect every candidate.
lockedConstraints: Do not mutate the target MieNDI repository.
Use real MieNDI page content and public assets.
Do not auto-recommend until the customer-image benchmark and win conditions are satisfied.
Keep rejected candidates available only as evidence.

customerImageReference.label: Suruga Inspection customer image
observedSignals: non-destructive inspection company with visible industrial credibility
safety and reassurance proposition appears before service browsing
inspection method breadth is concrete: UT, RT, PT, MT, VT and related field services
certifications and institutional trust matter: CIW, ISO, registration, quality assurance
service information density is expected, but it must be structured and readable
real field/company imagery should function as evidence, not decoration
mustNotCopy: do not clone the Suruga layout
do not reuse Suruga copy as MieNDI copy
do not treat old-looking visual style as the target just because the reference has legacy elements

weaknessesToBeat: first view must explain what company this is before visual polish
field credibility must be concrete instead of stock-like atmosphere
copy hierarchy must make inspection methods and trust proof scannable
the screen must not feel like an AI-generated landing-page template

winConditions: beats the current MieNDI TOP page on first-view clarity
feels like a serious inspection company a customer can trust
uses photos as proof of field work rather than decorative hero texture
shows service breadth and credentials without becoming a cluttered menu dump
passes a human adoption review before auto_recommend is allowed
antiReference: legacy corporate page copied without improving hierarchy

visualGrammar.summary: Industrial trust for non-destructive testing calibrated against the Suruga Inspection customer image: concrete safety promise, field credibility, certification proof, and service breadth without generic landing-page styling.

benchmarkReference.interpretation: Use as a customer-image benchmark for NDT credibility and information shape, not as a visual clone target.

referenceFit: lead with the real company name and field safety proposition
use actual inspection/field photography as the first-viewport signal
show proof points before generic service cards
surface inspection methods and credentials as concrete trust signals
keep the palette light and precise, not heavy dark-console or rustic
beat the reference on hierarchy and visual maturity while preserving its industrial seriousness

tokens.shadow: short blue-gray elevation only for proof surfaces

layoutRules: first viewport is full-bleed image-led and leaves the proof strip visible
proof points use dense but readable rows rather than floating marketing cards
navigation remains calm and legible on the image
copy hierarchy must make the company and safety proposition readable in under 5 seconds
service breadth should read like inspected expertise, not a generic card catalog
auto-recommend is invalid if the screen only has a real photo but weak composition

antiTaste: white card grid plus blue CTA template
rounded card stacks with thin soft shadows
solving design quality with gradients alone
restaurant-like luxury or unrelated benchmark residue
abstract safety copy without concrete inspection proof
real photo present but composition, hierarchy, and customer-image fit are weak
auto recommendation before beating the customer-image benchmark
